name: fzac-backend
description: Backend para el portfolio FZAC con CRUD de obras y seguridad básica

scripts.prisma:deploy:portfolio: prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260707123000_admin_crud_supabase/migration.sql --schema prisma/direct-schema.prisma && prisma db execute --file prisma/migrations/20260710143000_complete_portfolio_crud/migration.sql --schema prisma/direct-schema.prisma
scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check app.js && node --check api/index.js && node --check data/portfolio-catalog.js && node --check models/admin.model.js && node --check services/upload.service.js && prisma validate
